title: Pretoria, Gauteng — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Pretoria, Gauteng: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Pretoria is a city in Gauteng with a population of 2,473,000. The administrative capital of South Africa, known for its jacaranda-lined streets, government buildings, and universities.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
